HERO.NAME: Giovanny Jukopila
HERO.DESCRIPTION: Full Stack Software Engineer with 5+ years shipping web & mobile products end to end. Tech-agnostic by mindset, I pair solid engineering fundamentals with AI-assisted workflows (Claude, agents) to learn fast and deliver with speed, quality and security, whatever the stack demands.

ABOUT.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT.STORY: I'm a Full Stack Software Engineer based in Malta, originally from Colombia. I design, build, deploy and maintain scalable web and mobile applications across frontend, backend, databases and cloud.
ABOUT.STORY2: I'm tech-agnostic and a fast learner: I don't limit myself to the tools I already know. With modern AI-assisted workflows (Claude, agents) I ramp up on new stacks quickly and ship with speed, effectiveness and security, without compromising engineering quality.

SKILLS.TITLE: Technical Skills
SKILLS.SUBTITLE: A pragmatic, full-stack toolset spanning web, mobile and cloud.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Featured Projects
PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Real products I've built and shipped, from SaaS platforms to mobile apps and corporate sites.

SERVICES.EYEBROW: What I can do for you
SERVICES.TITLE: How I Can Help
SERVICES.SUBTITLE: From a first idea to a product live in front of users. Pick what you need, or hand me the whole thing.
SERVICES.S1_TEXT: Fast, responsive and SEO-friendly sites and web apps. From landing pages that convert to complex dashboards and multi-tenant platforms.
SERVICES.S2_TEXT: Cross-platform iOS & Android apps with Flutter, shipped to the App Store and Google Play with a native look and feel.
SERVICES.S3_TEXT: Turn your idea into a working product. Full-stack builds with auth, payments, databases and cloud, ready to validate with real users.
SERVICES.S4_TEXT: An extra pair of senior hands for your team: feature delivery, code reviews, architecture and AI-assisted workflows to ship faster.

TESTIMONIALS.TITLE: What People Say
TESTIMONIALS.SUBTITLE: Feedback from teams and clients I've built products with.
TESTIMONIALS.TRUSTED: Trusted by teams I've worked with

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Work Experience
EXPERIENCE.SUBTITLE: 5+ years delivering software across startups and agencies in Europe and Latin America.

CONTACT.TITLE: Let's Build Something Together
CONTACT.SUBTITLE: Have an idea or a project in mind? Tell me about it and let's bring it to life.
CONTACT.CONNECT_TEXT: Whether you need a new product built from scratch, an existing one improved, or an extra pair of expert hands on your team, I'm here to help you ship it. Tell me about your project and I'll reply within 24 hours.
